feedback.text: As a consumer and someone who believes in the rights of consumers to own what we buy, It would mean a lot to me if a law was added, that would demand an end-of-life plan for videogames. It is far too common for publishers to shut down servers only a few years after the game is published, without allowing the gamers to make their own servers. This kind of behaviour from game companies is unacceptable. Best regards.
